nasb.text: “And it shall be with regard to an inheritance for them, that I am their inheritance; and you shall give them no possession in Israel—I am their possession.

esv.text: “This shall be their inheritance: I am their inheritance: and you shall give them no possession in Israel; I am their possession.

cnv.text: “祭司必有產業；我就是他們的產業。你們不可在以色列中給他們基業；我就是他們的基業。

ccb.text: “‘祭司不可在以色列拥有自己的产业，因为我就是他们的产业。
